barbarian.name: Barbarian
starting_equipment: greataxe or any martial melee weapon
two handaxes or any simple weapon

1.name: Rage
1.description: Bonus action: enter a rage. Advantage on Str checks/saves; bonus damage on melee Str attacks; resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, slashing. 2 uses/long rest.

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.description: AC = 10 + Dex mod + Con mod when not wearing armor.

2.name: Reckless Attack
2.description: Gain advantage on Str melee attacks this turn; attacks against you have advantage until your next turn.

2.name: Danger Sense
2.description: Advantage on Dex saves vs. effects you can see.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

5.name: Fast Movement
5.description: +10 ft speed when not in heavy armor.

bard.name: Bard
starting_equipment: rapier or longsword or any simple weapon

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Cha-based caster. Cantrips known: 2. Spells known: 4. Slots: 2 first-level.

1.name: Bardic Inspiration
1.description: Bonus action: give an ally a d6 they can add to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw within 10 minutes. Cha mod uses/long rest.

2.name: Jack of All Trades
2.description: Add half proficiency bonus to ability checks not already proficient.

2.name: Song of Rest
2.description: Allies regaining HP at end of short rest gain extra d6.

3.name: Expertise
3.description: Double proficiency on two chosen skills.

cleric.name: Cleric
starting_equipment: scale mail or leather armor or chain mail (if proficient)
light crossbow with 20 bolts or any simple weapon

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Wis-based caster. Prepares Wis mod + level spells daily. Cantrips known: 3.

1.name: Divine Domain
1.description: Choose a subclass at level 1; grants domain spells and features.

2.name: Channel Divinity
2.description: Use Channel Divinity (turn undead + domain option) once/short rest.

5.name: Destroy Undead (CR 1/2)
5.description: When you turn undead, those with CR <= threshold are destroyed.

druid.name: Druid
starting_equipment: wooden shield or any simple weapon
scimitar or any simple melee weapon

1.name: Druidic
1.description: Secret druidic language.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Wis-based caster. Prepares Wis mod + level spells. Cantrips known: 2.

2.name: Wild Shape
2.description: Action: transform into a beast you've seen with CR limit. 2 uses/short rest.

fighter.name: Fighter
starting_equipment: chain mail or leather + longbow + 20 arrows
martial weapon + shield or two martial weapons
light crossbow + 20 bolts or two handaxes

1.name: Fighting Style
1.description: Choose: Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, or Two-Weapon Fighting.

1.name: Second Wind
1.description: Bonus action: regain 1d10 + level HP. Once/short rest.

2.name: Action Surge
2.description: Take an additional action on your turn. Once/short rest.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

monk.name: Monk
tool_profs: one artisan's tool or musical instrument

1.name: Unarmored Defense
1.description: AC = 10 + Dex mod + Wis mod.

1.name: Martial Arts
1.description: Use Dex for unarmed/monk weapon attacks; bonus unarmed strike; martial arts die starts at d4.

2.name: Ki
2.description: Pool of ki points = level. Spend on Flurry of Blows, Patient Defense, Step of the Wind.

3.name: Deflect Missiles
3.description: Reaction: reduce ranged attack damage by 1d10 + Dex + level.

paladin.name: Paladin
starting_equipment: martial weapon + shield or two martial weapons
five javelins or any simple melee weapon

1.name: Divine Sense
1.description: Action: detect celestials/fiends/undead within 60 ft. 1 + Cha mod uses/long rest.

1.name: Lay on Hands
1.description: Pool of HP = level x 5 to heal by touch.

2.name: Fighting Style
2.description: Choose: Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, or Protection.

2.name: Spellcasting
2.description: Cha-based half-caster. Prepares Cha mod + half level spells.

2.name: Divine Smite
2.description: On a melee weapon hit: spend a spell slot to deal +2d8 radiant damage (+1d8 per slot above 1; +1d8 vs. undead/fiends).

ranger.name: Ranger
starting_equipment: two shortswords or two simple melee weapons

1.name: Favored Enemy
1.description: Choose a creature type; advantage on tracking and Int checks to recall info.

1.name: Natural Explorer
1.description: Choose a terrain type; bonuses to navigation, foraging, and stealth there.

2.name: Fighting Style
2.description: Choose: Archery, Defense, Dueling, or Two-Weapon Fighting.

2.name: Spellcasting
2.description: Wis-based half-caster. Spells known scale with level.

3.name: Primeval Awareness
3.description: Spend a spell slot to sense favored enemies in 1-mile radius.

5.name: Extra Attack
5.description: Attack twice when taking the Attack action.

rogue.name: Rogue
starting_equipment: shortbow + quiver of 20 arrows or shortsword
burglar's pack or dungeoneer's pack or explorer's pack

1.name: Expertise
1.description: Double proficiency on two chosen skills (or one skill + thieves' tools).

1.name: Sneak Attack
1.description: Once/turn: extra 1d6 damage on a finesse/ranged attack with advantage or when an ally is within 5 ft of target. Scales with level.

1.name: Thieves' Cant
1.description: Secret thieves' language.

2.name: Cunning Action
2.description: Bonus action: Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

5.name: Uncanny Dodge
5.description: Reaction: halve the damage from one attack you can see.

sorcerer.name: Sorcerer
starting_equipment: light crossbow + 20 bolts or any simple weapon

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Cha-based caster. Cantrips known: 4. Spells known: 2.

1.name: Sorcerous Origin
1.description: Choose a subclass at level 1.

2.name: Font of Magic
2.description: Pool of sorcery points = level. Convert between slots and points.

3.name: Metamagic
3.description: Choose 2 metamagic options to spend sorcery points on (Twinned, Quickened, etc).

warlock.name: Warlock
starting_equipment: light crossbow + 20 bolts or any simple weapon

1.name: Otherworldly Patron
1.description: Choose a subclass at level 1.

1.name: Pact Magic
1.description: Cha-based caster with short-rest slots. Cantrips known: 2. Spells known: 2. Slots: 1.

2.name: Eldritch Invocations
2.description: Choose 2 invocations; gain more at higher levels.

3.name: Pact Boon
3.description: Choose: Pact of the Chain, Blade, or Tome.

1.name: Spellcasting
1.description: Int-based caster. Cantrips known: 3. Spellbook starts with 6 first-level spells; prepares Int mod + level.

1.name: Arcane Recovery
1.description: Once/day on a short rest: recover spell slots (level/2 rounded up) of level 5 or lower.

_full_caster_slots.comment: Spell slot table for full casters (bard, cleric, druid, sorcerer, wizard).

_half_caster_slots.comment: Spell slot table for half-casters (paladin, ranger). Starts at level 2.

_warlock_slots.comment: Pact magic: all slots same level, recovered on short rest.
